A

applyAll(String, List<Replacement>) - Static method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.replacement.Replacement
 
applyNormalizationRules(String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Applies all entries from normalizations.csv to the raw input (step 1 of the pipeline).
applyRule(String, Rule) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Applies a selected rule to the raw input and produces the normalized parser expression (step 4 of the pipeline).
applyTo(String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.replacement.Replacement
 

B

buildFacetString(List<FacetNotation>) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Builds the pipe-separated facet id string from a list of notations (step 5b of the pipeline).

C

computeIndexDay(LocalDate, TimeParser.IndexDaysMode) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Converts a calendar date to a sortable index day number (step 6 of the pipeline).

createOutputString(List<TokenWithValue>) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.Outputter
Creates the normalized output string for the supplied input token values.

Returns the value of the input record component.
InputParser - Class in de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data
Parses an input string using a list of Tokens, created from a rule's input specification by PatternParser, yielding a list of TokenWithValues.
InputParser(List<Token>, List<Replacement>, List<Replacement>) - Constructor for class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.InputParser
 

J

JULIAN_DAY - Enum constant in enum class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser.IndexDaysMode
Use Julian Day Number via JulianFields.JULIAN_DAY.

L

LEGACY - Enum constant in enum class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser.IndexDaysMode
Use the legacy era/year-of-era indexing algorithm.

O

output() - Method in record class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.http.HttpParseResponse
Returns the value of the output record component.
Outputter - Class in de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data
Creates a normalized output string using a list of TokenWithValues, created from a rule's input specification and an input string by PatternParser and InputParser, and a list of Tokens, created from a rule's output specification by PatternParser.
Outputter(List<Token>) - Constructor for class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.Outputter
 

P

Parses a mask/pattern pair into tokens.

Parses a normalized input string into a concrete TimeSpan.
parse(String, String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.PatternParser
Parses a mask/pattern pair and rejects duplicate variable names.

Mutable internal counter backing aggregated parse error statistics.

Immutable snapshot entry for aggregated parse errors.

parseInputString(String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.InputParser
Applies the configured token pattern to a normalized input string.
ParseResult - Class in de.ddb.labs.timeparser.model
Structured parse result for callers that need full parser metadata or JSON serialization.
ParseResult() - Constructor for class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.model.ParseResult
 
parseTime(String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input using default settings (no context id, Julian Day output index).
parseTime(String, TimeParser.IndexDaysMode) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input with an explicit day-index mode and no context id.
parseTime(String, String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input with optional context id using Julian Day output index.
parseTime(String, String, TimeParser.IndexDaysMode) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input with optional context id and explicit day-index mode.
parseTimeResult(String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input and returns the full structured result instead of only the legacy output string.
parseTimeResult(String, TimeParser.IndexDaysMode) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input into a structured result with an explicit day-index mode.
parseTimeResult(String, String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input into a structured result with an optional context id.
parseTimeResult(String, String, TimeParser.IndexDaysMode) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Parses input into a structured result with optional context id and explicit day-index mode.
PatternParser - Class in de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data
Parses a rule's input or output specification, yielding a list of Tokens.
PatternParser() - Constructor for class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.PatternParser
 
patternValue - Variable in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.data.Token
 

R

read(String, String) - Static method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.facet.FacetReader
Reads all facets from the configured classpath resource.

Reads all configured regex replacements from the given classpath resource.
read(String, String) - Static method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.rule.RuleReader
Reads all rules from the configured classpath resource.
read(String, String, boolean) - Static method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.replacement.ReplacementReader

read(String, String, boolean, String) - Static method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.replacement.ReplacementReader
Reads all configured replacements from the given classpath resource and optionally filters them by category from the third CSV column.

replaceWith(String, String) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.replacement.Replacement
 
resetErrorStats() - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Clears all aggregated parse error counters.
resolveFacetNotations(TimeSpan) - Method in class de.ddb.labs.timeparser.TimeParser
Looks up all DDB Zeitvokabular facets that overlap with the given time span (step 5 of the pipeline).
Rule - Class in de.ddb.labs.timeparser.rule
Transformation rule mapping one textual input pattern to a normalized output pattern.
